rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 21, 2016, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT UMPQUA BANK DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal filed on October 6, 2016. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RALPH F. JOHNSON VS. STANLEY CHON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn Vacate Void Judgmnt; Mtn Strike Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 21, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT STANLEY CHON Mtn Vacate Void Judgmnt; Motion to Strike Complaint is GRANTED pursuant to CCP 473(d). Defendant's Motion to Strike is DENIED. Defendant made a general appearance in this action. It appears that possession is no longer at issue and this case is converted into a breach of contract action by operation of law. Plaintiff is to pay additional filing fees within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. Defendant shall have 30 days to answer thereafter. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. IRMA G. MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Response
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 21, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANT IRMA MARTINEZ Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; is OFF CALENDAR. Amended Motion on file. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. IRMA G. MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 21, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANT IRMA MARTINEZ Amended Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment is DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b) and show excusable neglect, mistake or surprise. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF RODOLFO MARTINEZ VS. HECTOR TRESVINA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Hector Tresvina
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 21, 2016, line 4. PLAINTIFF ESTATE OF RODOLFO MARTINEZ Notice And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Hector Tresvina is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant's answer is stricken and Plaintiff may request an entry of default. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERIN SMITH VS. GREG DUGAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion On Demurrer By Defendant Greg Dugan To Complaint Of Plaintiff Erin Smith
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 21, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT GREG DUGAN Notice Of Motion On Demurrer By Defendant Greg Dugan To Complaint Of Plaintiff Erin Smith is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clarify the nature of the studio rental (e.g. "ancillary storage," additional living space, etc.) and whether the tenancy is being terminated for the studio space. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. NICHOLE THIERRY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday October 21, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT NICHOLE THIERRY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Opposing party failed to address the authorities cited by the defendant regarding insufficiency of the operative notice under 24 CFR 247.4(a)(2). =(501/REQ)
